headline: PH Q1 Deep Dive: Guidance Cut Weighs on Market Despite Aerospace and Cash Flow Strength
summary: Industrial machinery company Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $5.49 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $8.17 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
